zh.Little Crosby, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比
zh.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux是Richard Molyneux of Melling和Emma Donne of Utkinton的兒子，於1263年出生在英國藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比。他於大約1285年與Isabella de Scarisbrick在英國藍卡爾波爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年在英國藍卡爾澤福頓享年26歲。

zh-hans.Little Crosby, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux是Richard Molyneux of Melling和Emma Donne of Utkinton的儿子，于1263年出生在英国藍卡爾蕾托 哥羅士比。他于大约1285年与Isabella de Scarisbrick在英国藍卡爾波爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年在英国藍卡爾澤福頓享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux was born in 1263, in Little Crosby, Lancashire, England as the son of Richard Molyneux of Melling and Emma Donne of Utkinton. He married Isabella de Scarisbrick about 1285, in Bold, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1289, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux est né en 1263, à Little Crosby, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Richard Molyneux of Melling et Emma Donne of Utkinton. Il a épousé Isabella de Scarisbrick environ 1285, à Bold, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1289, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux wurde 1263 in Little Crosby, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Richard Molyneux of Melling und Emma Donne of Utkinton geboren. Er hat um 1285 in Bold, Lancashire, England Isabella de Scarisbrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1289 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux è nato il nel 1263 nel Little Crosby, Lancashire, England come figlio di Richard Molyneux of Melling e Emma Donne of Utkinton. Lui sposato Isabella de Scarisbrick circa 1285, nel Bold, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1289, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.Bold, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアボルド
ja.Sefton, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアセフトン
ja.Little Crosby, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアリットル クロスビー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneuxは1263年にイギリスランカシュアイアリットル クロスビーでRichard Molyneux of MellingとEmma Donne of Utkintonの息子として生まれた。約1285年にイギリスランカシュアイアボルドでIsabella de Scarisbrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux(은)는 1263년 영국 랭카실르 리틀 크로스비에서 Richard Molyneux of Melling(와)과 Emma Donne of Utkinton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1285년 영국 랭카실르 볼드에서 Isabella de Scarisbrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux nasceu em 1263, em Little Crosby, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Richard Molyneux of Melling e Emma Donne of Utkinton. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Scarisbrick aproximadamente 1285, em Bold, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1289, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux родился в 1263 г. в местности литл кросби, ланкашир, Англия. Его родителей звали Richard Molyneux of Melling и Emma Donne of Utkinton. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Scarisbrick около 1285 г. в местности болд, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William de Molyneux nació en 1263, en Little Crosby, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Richard Molyneux of Melling y Emma Donne of Utkinton. Se casó con Isabella de Scarisbrick aproximadamente 1285, en Bold, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1289, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
